findings.description: Source contains 3 h2-level headings (機能概要 with '--------', エンティティ情報 with '================', 電文仕様 with '========') but the knowledge file maps all content into a single section s1. エンティティ情報 and 電文仕様 are embedded as Markdown sub-headings (##) within s1 rather than being split into separate sections (s2, s3).
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 headings: '機能概要' (underline: --------), 'エンティティ情報' (underline: ================), '電文仕様' (underline: ========)
